zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saint於1081年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安文尼奧時，他的父親Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint17歲，母親Clydwen verch Gruffydd52歲。他於大約1086年與Angharad Verch Llywelyn在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1194年在威爾士享年113歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saint于1081年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利安文尼奧时，他的父亲Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint17岁，母亲Clydwen verch Gruffydd52岁。他于大约1086年与Angharad Verch Llywelyn在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1194年在威尔士享年113岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saint was born in 1081, in Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint, was 17 and his mother, Clydwen verch Gruffydd, was 52. He married Angharad Verch Llywelyn about 1086, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1194, in Wales, at the age of 113, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saint est né en 1081, à Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Clydwen verch Gruffydd, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Angharad Verch Llywelyn environ 1086, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1194, à Galles, à l’âge de 113 ans, et a été enterré à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saint 1081 in Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint 17 und seine Mutter Clydwen verch Gruffydd 52. Er hat um 1086 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Angharad Verch Llywelyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1194 im Alter von 113 Jahren in Wales und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saint è nato il nel 1081 nel Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Clydwen verch Gruffydd, aveva 52 anni. Lui sposato Angharad Verch Llywelyn circa 1086, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1194, nel Galles, all'età di 113 anni, e fu sepolto a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Wales: イギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランウィニオ

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saintが1081年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランウィニオで生まれた時，父Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saintは17歳，母Clydwen verch Gruffyddは52歳であった。約1086年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでAngharad Verch Llywelynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1194年にウェールズで113歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saint(이)가 1081년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜윈이오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Clydwen verch Gruffydd(은)는 52세였다. 그는 대략 1086년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Angharad Verch Llywelyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년 웨일스에서 113세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saint nasceu em 1081, em Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Clydwen verch Gruffydd, tinha 52 anos. Ele casou-se com Angharad Verch Llywelyn aproximadamente 1086, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1194, em Gales, com 113 anos, e foi sepultado em Gales, United Kingdom.

ro.Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saint родился в 1081 г. в местности лланвинио, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Clydwen verch Gruffydd, 52. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad Verch Llywelyn около 1086 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1194 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 113 лет и был похоронен в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhys ap Bledri, of Cil y Saint nació en 1081, en Llanwinio, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Bledri ap Cydidor Fawr, of Cil y Saint, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Clydwen verch Gruffydd, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Angharad Verch Llywelyn aproximadamente 1086, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1194, en Gales, a la edad de 113 años, y fue sepultado en Gales, Reino Unido.
